overview: WarriorMED provides testosterone replacement therapy and functional medicine for men, led by a naturopathic doctor with nearly 10 years of experience and 4,000+ patients treated. The clinic focuses on personalized, root-cause approaches to hormone optimization and overall health improvement.
highlights: Functional medicine and natural methods approach
Peptide therapies for muscle recovery and growth hormone optimization
targetAudience: Men with low testosterone or related symptoms seeking personalized hormone optimization.
